_README: Boot recipe for the ablation sweep. Each config = the FULL flag set MINUS one cognitive layer. Boot the agent with the listed flags, run `ablation_eval.py run --config <name>`, then move to the next. Reference is 'full'.
_isolation:
Give EVERY config a FRESH, EMPTY GHOST_HOME so memory/selfhood/workspace start blank and don't leak across configs. Use a test port distinct from your production agent, and STOP the production agent first (or use a separate GHOST_SANDBOX_DIR) so Docker/port don't clash. Example per-config boot wrapper:
  TMP=$(mktemp -d)
  GHOST_HOME="$TMP" GHOST_SANDBOX_DIR="$TMP/sandbox" \
    python -m src.ghost_agent.main --port 8010 --upstream-url http://127.0.0.1:8088 \
      --api-key '' <CONFIG FLAGS> &
  # wait for http://127.0.0.1:8010/api/version, then:
  GHOST_HOME="$TMP" python scripts/ablation_eval.py run --config <name> --base-url http://127.0.0.1:8010 --repeats 5
_note_tor: Tor is NOT the variable under test; --no-mandatory-tor removes it as a slow/flaky confound for purely-local tasks. Keep it if your tasks need the network — just keep it CONSTANT across all configs.

configs.name: full
configs.note: All cognitive layers ON (mirrors production minus Tor). Everything else is measured against this.

configs.name: full_no_metacog
configs.note: Drops the metacognition uplift (validators, competence, entropy, composite confidence, dual-solver arbiter).

configs.name: full_no_deepreason
configs.note: Drops MCTS lookahead + parallel hypothesis testing. Watch the latency delta closely — deep-reason is expensive.

configs.name: full_no_preflight
configs.note: Drops the pre-flight repeat-failure guard. Expect to see it only on robustness/loop tasks.

configs.name: full_no_selfmodel
configs.note: Selfhood off. On a FRESH GHOST_HOME this should change almost nothing in-session; that is expected, not proof of uselessness. Judge it via Track B.

configs.name: full_no_workspace
configs.note: Workspace continuity off. Same caveat as selfmodel.

configs.name: full_no_reflection
configs.note: Idle self-critique off. Its payoff is on the NEXT session after a failure — Track B territory.

configs.name: full_no_memory
configs.note: All persistent stores off (also forces self/workspace off). On a fresh GHOST_HOME this is near-identical to full in-session; the gap appears only across sessions.

configs.name: thin
configs.note: Cognitive layers stripped to the bone (metacog, deep-reason, postmortem all default-off; reflection/self/workspace/preflight forced off). The floor: full's TOTAL in-session lift over thin is the headline number.
